understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the `+` goal gem tile without landing on any spike tiles (`u`/`v`).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Move horizontally with MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT; after each move gravity automatically pulls the player vertically until landing on a safe tile, hitting a spike, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at the given coordinates. Each level gives 2 attempts of max 50 turns; failure restarts the level.
